subject: feat(phase2): add counterparty, invitations, handshake, and proposal system
body:
Phase 2 frontend with mock data:
- Role switcher in header to toggle creator/counterparty views
- Project invitation flow (email + passphrase form)
- Handshake status component (pending/accepted states)
- Counterparty read-only module view with propose change button
- Proposal system: create, accept, reject, counter-proposal flow
- Agreement request flow: counterparty requests, creator accepts
- Role-based UI controls (edit/delete/reorder hidden from counterparty)
- GitHub Actions workflow for GitHub Pages deployment
- Updated backend spec with Phase 2 tables and RLS policies

type: feature
complexity: large
